title: tsdocs-builder Configuration
description: Configuration file schema for tsdocs-builder CLI tool that generates Docusaurus-compatible documentation from TypeScript source code.

input.description: Path to the TypeScript source directory to document. Can be absolute or relative to config file location.

output.description: Path to the output directory where documentation markdown files will be written. Can be absolute or relative to config file location.

baseName.description: Optional package/library name to use in the generated documentation title. If not provided, inferred from input directory name.

include.description: Glob patterns for files to include in documentation generation. Relative to input directory.

exclude.description: Glob patterns for files to exclude from documentation generation. Applied to full file paths.

ignorePaths.description: Folder/file patterns to skip during documentation generation. Supports glob patterns like 'hooks/', 'tests/*.ts', '**/internal/**'. Applied to relative path segments.

skipPrivate.description: Skip documenting private class members and methods (starting with # or marked private).

skipDeprecated.description: Skip documenting items marked with @deprecated JSDoc tag.

ignoreSources.description: Omit source file location references from generated documentation.

skipInternal.description: Skip documenting items marked with @internal JSDoc tag, including internal enum members and interface members.

sidebar.description: Generate a sidebar configuration file for the documentation framework.

sidebarStyle.description: Documentation framework to generate sidebar for. Affects sidebar file format and naming.

groupBy.description: How to group exports in documentation. 'kind' groups by type (functions, interfaces, etc.), 'folder' groups by source directory structure.

sortBy.description: Sort order for exports within groups. 'alphabetical' sorts by name, 'source' preserves source order, 'category' groups by declaration type.

treatAsSingleModule.description: Treat all source files as a single module without subdirectory grouping. Creates flat output structure.

dryrun.description: Preview mode: parse source and show what would be generated without writing any files.

showMissingRef.description: Flag exports missing JSDoc documentation. Emits a warning summary at the end of generation listing all undocumented exports.
